purpose: Fresh bounded local MOD-17 Canny micro-matrix sample. Single-variable test against the retained 0.42/0.60 candidate: raise ControlNet strength to 0.43 while keeping seed, prompt, control image, and end percent unchanged.

qa_focus: identity and face-shape drift against retained 0.42/0.60 candidate
